scenarios.name: Normal V2X Network
scenarios.description: Stable vehicular network with moderate traffic, balanced requirements
scenarios.reasoning: Balanced network conditions favor Hybrid consensus for adaptive operation

scenarios.name: Byzantine Attack
scenarios.description: High-risk attack scenario requiring maximum security
scenarios.reasoning: High attack risk + high energy budget + high decentralization -> PoW provides strongest 51% attack resistance

scenarios.name: Emergency Scale-up
scenarios.description: Mass event with ultra-high throughput demand
scenarios.reasoning: Massive throughput requirement (7700 TPS) + large network -> DPoS with delegated block production

scenarios.name: Energy-Constrained
scenarios.description: Low power budget requires energy-efficient consensus
scenarios.reasoning: Low energy budget (0.25) eliminates PoW; PoS provides good security with minimal energy

scenarios.name: Small Network / Low Latency
scenarios.description: Small RSU cluster needing instant finality
scenarios.reasoning: Small network (40 nodes) + ultra-low latency (2s) + strong consistency (0.92) -> PBFT with O(N²) is feasible

byzantine_resilience.description: At attack_risk > 0.41, model switches from Hybrid to PoW for maximum security
